title: kaphaph #3721
definition:
1) to bend, bend down, bow down, be bent, be bowed
    1a) (Qal) to bend down, bow down
    1b) (Niphal) to bow oneself down
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to bend, bend down, bow down, be bent, be bowed
    1a) (Qal) to bend down, bow down
    1b) (Niphal) to bow oneself down

    NASB:  to bend, bend down, be bent or bowed
